title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 21
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a lost rucksack.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you found your rucksack yet? You seemed worried earlier today. || Boy: Not at first. I went back to the sports centre after football practice, and then I checked the bus station, but nobody had handed it in. || Girl: So where did it turn up? || Boy: The café owner has just called. [1]It was under a chair near the café door[/1]. I will collect it before the place closes, because I need it tomorrow. || Girl: That is a relief. At least you can stop searching and get ready now.
items.question: Where is the rucksack?

options.C: Under a chair in the café

items.explanation: The rucksack was under a chair near the café door.

items.context: You hear two students preparing for a walk in the hills.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you packed for the walk in the hills tomorrow yet? I put my sunglasses in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Girl: That was mentioned earlier, but the latest forecast says it will rain during lunch. [1]Everyone needs to bring a light jacket with a hood now[/1].. || Boy: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a warm hat as well? || Girl: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What should the student take?

options.A: A light jacket with a hood

items.explanation: The student should take a light jacket with a hood.

items.context: You hear two students talking about an after-school club.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still meeting in the computer room for the after-school club? I wrote it down yesterday, but I have not checked today's message. || Man: That was the original plan, but the computers are being repaired this week. [1]We need to meet in the art room instead[/1].. || Woman: Good thing I asked. I nearly went to the old place and waited there. What about the library? || Man: No, nobody will be waiting there. I will arrive a few minutes early and message you if anything changes again before we start.
items.question: Where will the after-school club be?
items.explanation: The club will meet in the art room.

items.context: You hear two passengers talking at a railway station.
items.audio_script: Man: Are we still meeting on platform two for the train to Bristol? I wrote it down yesterday, but I have not checked today's message. || Woman: That was the original plan, but staff are directing passengers away from the usual platform. [1]We need to go to the footbridge now[/1].. || Man: Good thing I asked. I nearly went to the old place and waited there. What about the ticket office? || Woman: No, nobody will be waiting there. I will arrive a few minutes early and message you if anything changes again before we start.
items.question: Where should the passengers go now?
items.explanation: They must go to the footbridge.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a broken computer.
items.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting on with your laptop? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Boy: I first thought the screen was damaged, and my brother wondered whether the keyboard had stopped working. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [1]It started properly as soon as the engineer changed the charger cable[/1].. || Girl: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it for my homework tonight. || Boy: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What was the problem with the computer?
items.explanation: Changing the charger cable made the computer work again.

items.context: You hear two friends choosing food at a café.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you chosen what to order? The queue is moving quickly, and we need to leave soon. || Girl: I nearly chose the soup, and I also looked at a cheese sandwich, but the sandwiches all contain cheese and I had soup yesterday. || Boy: So what are you going to have? I need to choose mine before we reach the counter. || Girl: [1]I am going to have the baked potato instead[/1].. It should be enough for me, and then we can find somewhere quiet to sit before we go.
items.question: What will the speaker eat?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses a baked potato.

items.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to go swimming this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Man: That was our first plan, but the pool closes early and it looks like rain. We also thought about whether to walk in the park. || Woman: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Man: [1]We are going to the bowling centre instead[/1].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Woman: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do?
